Darker flame areas use warm brown-amber darks rather than neutral grey or pure black, satisfying the colored-shadow requirement. Mood is unambiguously BRIGHT/WARM and energetic. No neon, no cold blue, no desaturated mud, no near-black greys in the actual sprite (the dark-background preview panels are display scaffolding, not asset pixels). Minor note: no complementary cool accent (teal/sky) to create tension, but for a pure fire VFX this monochromatic warm approach is stylistically correct and internally harmonious. Palette compatibility with Echoes reference is strong.
